changelog: The remote-access QR code's one-shot generation during provisioning has no retry -- if it fails (network hiccup, DNS not ready, etc.) the QR stays broken forever with nothing to notice or fix it. Added a self-heal check (ensure_remote_qr) to first_boot.sh's maintenance-mode branch, alongside the existing watcher/dashboard self-heals, so a missing QR gets regenerated on the next boot automatically.
